description_long: This is a light blue bucket hat with a soft, rounded crown and a downward-sloping brim that encircles the entire hat. The fabric appears to be a tightly woven cotton or cotton-blend textile, giving it a matte finish and a slightly textured surface. The brim is moderately wide and features visible concentric stitching lines, adding both structure and subtle visual detail. The crown is seamless on the sides, with a single vertical seam visible at the back, and the top is flat with a gentle curve. There are no visible decorative elements, logos, or ventilation eyelets, giving the hat a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The interior is not visible, but it is likely lined with a similar or lighter fabric for comfort.
description: A light blue, fabric bucket hat with a rounded crown and a stitched, downward-sloping brim. The design is minimalist and unadorned, with a matte, slightly textured finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded crown and the full width of the downward-sloping brim, with visible stitching detail.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the continuous curve of the brim and the smooth, seamless side of the crown.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the vertical seam at the back of the crown and the even, circular shape of the brim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the uninterrupted brim and crown with no visible decorations.
